title: derris lianoides
intro: Derris lianoides, also known as Derris or Kanthari, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and Australia, belonging to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Derris lianoides include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use as a natural insecticide. Derris lianoides is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, decoctions, and ointments, and is also used in traditional remedies for snake bites and other poisonous stings.
